plain_question_nl: Hoeveel was uw netto winst uit uw bedrijf dit jaar (omzet minus alle zakelijke kosten)?
plain_question_en: What was your net profit from your business this year (revenue minus all business expenses)?
plain_question_fa: سود خالص کسب‌وکار شما در این سال چقدر بود (درآمد منهای همه هزینه‌های تجاری)؟
help_text_nl: Dit is uw omzet minus alle zakelijke kosten, vóór de ondernemersaftrek. Geen kosten? Gebruik dan uw bruto-omzet.
help_text_en: This is revenue minus business costs, BEFORE ZZP deductions (zelfstandigenaftrek etc.).
help_text_fa: این درآمد منهای هزینه‌های تجاری است، قبل از کسرهای ZZP (مانند zelfstandigenaftrek).
common_mistakes: Using revenue (omzet) instead of profit (winst) — costs must be subtracted first
Forgetting to include all income sources (multiple clients, platforms)
Confusing this with BTW-turnover — these are different amounts
ai_follow_up_questions: Did you track all business expenses? (laptop, software, travel, training)
Did you receive any other income from business activities?
Do you have invoices outstanding that were issued but not yet paid?

plain_question_nl: Hoeveel loon of uitkeringen ontving u dit jaar (bruto, uit uw jaaropgaaf)?
plain_question_en: What was your total employment income this year (gross, from your jaaropgaaf)?
plain_question_fa: کل درآمد کارمندی شما در این سال چقدر بود (ناخالص، از jaaropgaaf)؟
help_text_nl: U vindt dit op uw jaaropgaaf van uw werkgever. Heeft u meerdere jaaropgaven? Tel ze bij elkaar op.
help_text_en: Found on your jaaropgaaf from employer. Multiple jobs: add all jaaropgaven together.
help_text_fa: این مبلغ را در jaaropgaaf از کارفرمایتان می‌یابید. چندین کار: همه آنها را جمع کنید.
common_mistakes: Using net salary instead of gross salary from jaaropgaaf
Forgetting holiday pay or bonuses (these are on the jaaropgaaf)
Missing income from second job or part-time work
ai_follow_up_questions: Do you have a jaaropgaaf from your employer?
Did you receive any bonuses or holiday allowance (vakantiegeld)?
Did you work for multiple employers this year?

plain_question_nl: Heeft u in 2026 minimaal 1.225 uur aan uw onderneming besteed?
plain_question_en: Did you spend at least 1,225 hours on your business in 2026?
plain_question_fa: آیا در ۲۰۲۶ حداقل ۱٬۲۲۵ ساعت در کسب‌وکار خود کار کردید؟
help_text_nl: Als u het urencriterium haalt (1.225+ uur), heeft u recht op €1.200 zelfstandigenaftrek. Houd een urenregistratie bij!
help_text_en: If you meet the hours requirement (1,225+), you qualify for €1,200 deduction. Keep a time log!
help_text_fa: اگر معیار ساعتی (۱٬۲۲۵+) را رعایت کردید، ۱٬۲۰۰ یورو کسر دریافت می‌کنید. ثبت ساعات کاری داشته باشید!
common_mistakes: Only counting billable hours — admin, networking, training all count too
Not keeping a time log — Belastingdienst can ask for proof
Applying zelfstandigenaftrek when hours were under 1,225
ai_follow_up_questions: Do you have a time registration to prove the 1,225 hours if asked?
Roughly how many hours per week did you work on your business?
Did you include administrative hours, networking, and training in your count?

plain_question_nl: Bent u in de eerste 5 jaar van uw ondernemerschap en heeft u de startersaftrek nog geen 3 keer gebruikt?
plain_question_en: Are you in the first 5 years of entrepreneurship and have you used startersaftrek fewer than 3 times?
plain_question_fa: آیا در ۵ سال اول کارآفرینی هستید و startersaftrek را کمتر از ۳ بار استفاده کرده‌اید؟
help_text_nl: LAATSTE JAAR! Startersaftrek (€2.123) wordt in 2027 afgeschaft. Gebruik het nu als u in aanmerking komt.
help_text_en: LAST YEAR! Startersaftrek (€2,123) is abolished from 2027. Claim it now if eligible.
help_text_fa: آخرین سال! Startersaftrek (۲٬۱۲۳ یورو) از ۲۰۲۷ لغو می‌شود. اگر واجد شرایط هستید، همین الان استفاده کنید.
common_mistakes: Not knowing how many times they've already used it
Thinking 5-year window is from registration date (it's from first entrepreneurial year)
Missing the last chance in 2026 — many eligible starters don't realize it's being abolished
ai_follow_up_questions: In which year did you first work as an entrepreneur?
Have you used the startersaftrek in previous years? How many times?

plain_question_nl: De MKB-winstvrijstelling (12,7%) wordt automatisch berekend. Heeft u winst uit onderneming?
plain_question_en: The MKB-winstvrijstelling (12.7%) is calculated automatically on your profit. Do you have business profit?
plain_question_fa: MKB-winstvrijstelling (۱۲.۷٪) به طور خودکار محاسبه می‌شود. آیا سود کسب‌وکار دارید؟
help_text_nl: Dit is geen extra actie nodig — de Belastingdienst berekent het automatisch op uw winst na ondernemersaftrek.
help_text_en: No extra action needed — automatically 12.7% of profit after ondernemersaftrek is exempt from tax.
help_text_fa: نیازی به اقدام اضافی نیست — به طور خودکار ۱۲.۷٪ از سود پس از ondernemersaftrek از مالیات معاف می‌شود.
common_mistakes: Applying MKB before unternemersaftrek instead of after
Thinking MKB requires hours worked (it doesn't — no urencriterium)

plain_question_nl: Heeft u in 2026 premies betaald voor een lijfrenteverzekering of gestort op een lijfrenterekening?
plain_question_en: Did you pay premiums for a lijfrente (pension) product or make deposits to a pension account in 2026?
plain_question_fa: آیا در ۲۰۲۶ برای یک محصول بازنشستگی (lijfrente) مشارکت پرداخت کردید؟
help_text_nl: Als ZZP'er kunt u tot 30% van uw inkomen minus de AOW-franchise (€19.172) aftrekken voor pensioenopbouw. Dit is de meest onderbenutte aftrekpost!
help_text_en: As a ZZP freelancer, you can deduct up to 30% of income minus AOW franchise (€19,172) for pension. This is the most underused deduction!
help_text_fa: به عنوان ZZP‌کار، می‌توانید تا ۳۰٪ از درآمد منهای فرانشیز AOW (۱۹٬۱۷۲ یورو) را برای بازنشستگی کسر کنید. این کمترین استفاده شده کسر است!
common_mistakes: Not knowing they have unused jaarruimte from past years (reserveringsruimte)
Confusing the contribution amount with the allowed maximum
Making the deposit after 31 December — must be paid in 2026 to deduct in 2026
ai_follow_up_questions: Have you ever contributed to a pension or lijfrente product as a ZZP freelancer?
What was your approximate income in 2025? (to calculate jaarruimte for 2026)
Do you know if you have unused jaarruimte from past years (reserveringsruimte)?

plain_question_nl: Bezit u 5% of meer van de aandelen van een BV of andere vennootschap?
plain_question_en: Do you own 5% or more of shares in a BV or other company?
plain_question_fa: آیا ۵٪ یا بیشتر از سهام یک BV یا شرکت دیگری را دارید؟
help_text_nl: Box 2 is alleen van toepassing als u een aanmerkelijk belang heeft (5%+ aandelen). Voor de meeste ZZP'ers met eenmanszaak is dit nihil.
help_text_en: Box 2 only applies with 5%+ shareholding. Most ZZP freelancers with eenmanszaak: answer is NO.
help_text_fa: جعبه ۲ فقط با مالکیت ۵٪+ سهام اعمال می‌شود. برای اکثر ZZP‌کاران با eenmanszaak: پاسخ خیر است.
common_mistakes: Confusing owning <5% shares (Box 3) with owning 5%+ shares (Box 2)
Not reporting dividend received from own BV
ai_follow_up_questions: Do you have a BV (besloten vennootschap)?
Did you receive dividend from your BV this year?
Did you sell shares in your company this year?

plain_question_nl: Wat was het totaal van uw spaargeld, beleggingen en andere bezittingen op 1 januari 2026?
plain_question_en: What was the total of your savings, investments, and other assets on 1 January 2026?
plain_question_fa: کل پس‌انداز، سرمایه‌گذاری‌ها و سایر دارایی‌های شما در اول ژانویه ۲۰۲۶ چقدر بود؟
help_text_nl: Teldatum is 1 januari 2026. Bezittingen: spaargeld, aandelen, obligaties, crypto, verhuurde woning. Schulden: consumptief krediet, studieschuld.
help_text_en: Reference date: 1 January 2026. Assets: savings, stocks, bonds, crypto, rental property. Liabilities: consumer loans, student debt.
help_text_fa: تاریخ مرجع: اول ژانویه ۲۰۲۶. دارایی‌ها: پس‌انداز، سهام، اوراق، ارز دیجیتال، ملک اجاره‌ای. بدهی‌ها: وام مصرفی، بدهی تحصیلی.
common_mistakes: Using year-end balance instead of 1 January balance
Forgetting cryptocurrency holdings
Not splitting between savings vs investments (different fictitious returns: 1.28% vs 6%)
Including the main home value — the primary residence is NOT in Box 3
ai_follow_up_questions: What type of assets do you have? (savings account, stocks, bonds, crypto, rental property?)
What was the balance on each savings/investment account on 1 January 2026?
Do you have any loans or debts that can be offset against Box 3 assets?

plain_question_nl: Heeft u in 2026 een voorlopige aanslag (voorschot op de belasting) betaald?
plain_question_en: Did you pay a provisional tax assessment (voorlopige aanslag) during 2026?
plain_question_fa: آیا در ۲۰۲۶ پیش‌پرداخت مالیاتی (voorlopige aanslag) پرداخت کردید؟
help_text_nl: Als u een voorlopige aanslag heeft betaald, wordt dit verrekend met uw definitieve belasting. Controleer uw MijnBelastingdienst.
help_text_en: If you paid provisional assessments during the year, these are offset against your final tax bill.
help_text_fa: اگر در طول سال پیش‌پرداخت مالیاتی پرداخت کردید، این با قبض نهایی مالیاتی شما تسویه می‌شود.
common_mistakes: Not requesting a voorlopige aanslag as ZZP — leads to large lump-sum tax bill in May
Forgetting to adjust the voorlopige aanslag when income changed during the year
ai_follow_up_questions: Did you request a voorlopige aanslag to spread your tax payments monthly?
If yes: did your income change significantly during the year? The voorlopige aanslag may need adjustment.
